data.title: Efficacy and Safety of Rasagiline in Prodromal Parkinson's Disease
data.brief_summary: To investigate whether a year of rasagiline may reduce the progression from idiopathic REM sleep behavior disorder (RBD) to Parkinson's disease (PD).
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* PSG confirmed RBD with subtle motor symptoms (4≤MDS-UPDRS-III≤10 at baseline)
* no clinical diagnosis of Parkinson's disease or dementia at baseline
* age 30-75
* no concomitant or previous use of any other anti-parkinson medications
* provide written informed consent

Exclusi
data.sponsor: Second Affiliated Hospital, School of Medicine, Zhejiang University
